title: Clean rel-stack PRMP Benchmark with Learned Embeddings (Resolving parent_dim=1 Confound)
summary: Demo notebook benchmarking 3 GNN variants (Standard, PRMP, Wide) on a synthetic heterogeneous graph from StackOverflow relational data. Trains on post-votes regression (MAE) and user-engagement classification (AUROC) tasks using pure PyTorch GNN layers. Includes visualization comparing small-scale demo results with full-scale pre-computed results from mini_demo_data.json (13 examples covering 11 FK links and 2 task metrics).
